## Before you commit

- [ ] The entry follows the template in [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — all fields present, in order
- [ ] No placeholders left (`TBD`, `TODO`, `FIXME`, `<command>`, `<symbol>`, `<category>`, etc.)
- [ ] Added one row to [`skills/INDEX.md`](../skills/INDEX.md)
- [ ] Ran `bash tests/e2e.sh` and it passed
- [ ] Star counts are stamped with the month they were checked (e.g. `~1,200 (as of 2026-07)`)
